query:
INSERT INTO event_reports (
                event_id, room_id, reporter_user_id, reported_user_id, event_json,
                reason, description, score, received_ts, status
            )
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9, 'open')
            RETURNING
                id AS "id!",
                event_id AS "event_id!",
                room_id AS "room_id!",
                reporter_user_id AS "reporter_user_id!",
                reported_user_id AS "reported_user_id?",
                event_json AS "event_json?",
                reason AS "reason?",
                description AS "description?",
                status AS "status!",
                score AS "score!",
                received_ts AS "received_ts!",
                resolved_at AS "resolved_ts?",
                resolved_by AS "resolved_by?",
                resolution_reason AS "resolution_reason?"
